footer.companyDescription: SmartRecruit helps teams manage jobs, candidates and hiring workflows.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.lead: The present terms govern the use of this service in a concise and traditional manner.

section1.title: 1. Scope of use
section1.p1: The service may be used solely for lawful recruiting operations and internal administration.
section1.p2: By continuing to use the platform, the user acknowledges the terms set forth herein.

section2.title: 2. Responsibilities
section2.p1: Each party shall use reasonable care with access credentials and submitted data.
section2.p2: The operator reserves the right to suspend access in the event of misuse or violation of policy.

terms.notice: This summary is for product navigation only and does not constitute legal advice.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.lead: This policy explains, in the customary manner, how personal information is handled.

section1.title: 1. Data collected
section1.p1: We process account, authentication and workflow data required for the service to function.
section1.p2: We limit collection to information necessary for user administration and product operation.

section2.title: 2. Data handling
section2.p1: Information is retained only as long as needed for service delivery and compliance.
section2.p2: Appropriate safeguards are applied to protect stored and transmitted information.

privacy.notice: This summary is for product navigation only and does not constitute legal advice.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.lead: This notice describes the cookies and similar mechanisms used by the application.

section1.title: 1. Essential cookies
section1.p1: Essential cookies support authentication, session continuity and saved preferences.
section1.p2: Disabling them may impair the proper operation of the application.

section2.title: 2. Functional cookies
section2.p1: Functional cookies may preserve theme and interface selections for convenience.
section2.p2: No non-essential cookie is intended to exceed the operational purpose of the service.

cookies.notice: This summary is for product navigation only and does not constitute legal advice.

support.title: Support Center
support.lead: This page records the customary steps for obtaining assistance from the service team.

section1.title: 1. How to request help
section1.p1: Please include the affected page, a brief description of the issue and the time of occurrence.
section1.p2: For authentication issues, mention the visible console message or URL query string if available.

section2.title: 2. Expected response
section2.p1: Requests are reviewed in order of receipt and handled according to operational priority.
section2.p2: Urgent access problems should be reported with enough detail to reproduce the condition.

support.notice: This summary is for product navigation only and does not constitute legal advice.

roadmap.title: Product Roadmap
roadmap.lead: The roadmap states the product direction in a clear and orderly fashion.

section1.title: 1. Current priorities
section1.p1: We are consolidating authentication, footer pages and API-driven reference screens.
section1.p2: The next step is to refine the semi-static content and keep user-facing navigation predictable.

section2.title: 2. Planned improvements
section2.p1: Planned work includes more analytics surfaces, more guided content and stronger localization coverage.
section2.p2: Feature updates will continue to preserve the existing application structure.

roadmap.notice: This summary is for product navigation only and does not constitute legal advice.
